debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0..Real.pi, sin x * f (cos x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in -1..1, f y

      have hanti : Antitone fun x : ℝ => Real.cos x := by
        intro x y hxy
        exact Real.cos_le_cos hxy
      exact hanti.monotoneOn (by intro x hx y hy hxy; exact hanti hxy))
    (himg := by
      ext y
      constructor
      · intro hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        have hx0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
          have := hx.1
          simpa using this
        have hxpi : x ≤ Real.pi := by
          have := hx.2
          simpa using this
        constructor
        · have : -1 ≤ Real.cos x := by
            simpa using (Real.neg_one_le_cos x)
          simpa using this
        · have : Real.cos x ≤ 1 := by
            simpa using (Real.cos_le_one x)
          simpa using this
      · intro hy
        have hy' : y ∈ Set.Icc (-1 : ℝ) 1 := by
          simpa [uIcc_of_le (show (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 by linarith)] using hy
        rcases (Real.exists_cos_eq_of_mem_Icc hy') with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        refine ⟨x, ?_, rfl⟩
        exact hx))

            have : x ≠ 0 := by

            exact lt_of_le_of_ne' (by exact (and.left (mem_Icc.mp hx))) this
          have hxπ : x < Real.pi := by
            have : x ≠ Real.pi := by

            exact lt_of_le_of_ne (by exact (and.right (mem_Icc.mp hx))) this

        have ha : (0 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_deriv_eq_integral_image
      (f := fun y => f y) (g := fun x => Real.cos x) (g' := fun x => -Real.sin x)
      (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := Real.pi)
      (by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by simpa [Set.uIcc] using hx
        simpa using (Real.hasDerivAt_cos x))
      (by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by simpa [Set.uIcc] using hx
        have : (Real.sin x) ≠ 0 := by
          have hx0 : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) hx'.2
          have hxpi : x < Real.pi := lt_of_le_of_lt hx'.1 (by linarith)
          exact (Real.sin_ne_zero_of_lt_of_lt hx0 hxpi)
        simpa [abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ Real.sin x from le_of_lt (Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          (by
            have : x ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩ <;> linarith [hx'.1, hx'.2]
            this)), abs_mul, abs_neg, abs_of_pos (Real.sin_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          (by
            have : x ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩ <;> linarith [hx'.1, hx'.2]
            this))])
      (by
        have : (Set.Icc (Real.cos Real.pi) (Real.cos (0 : ℝ))) = Set.Icc (-1 : ℝ) 1 := by
          simp [Real.cos_pi, Real.cos_zero]
        simpa [intervalIntegral, Real.cos_pi, Real.cos_zero, this, Set.image_eq_range] )

simpa [mul_comm] using (intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_deriv_eq_integral_image
    (f := fun y => f y) (g := Real.cos) (g' := fun x => -Real.sin x) (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := Real.pi)
    (by
      intro x hx
      simpa using (Real.deriv_cos x))
    (by
      intro x hx
      have : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := by
        simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using hx
      have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi := this
      have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := hx'.1
      have hxπ : x ≤ Real.pi := hx'.2
      have : 0 ≤ Real.sin x := by simpa using Real.sin_nonneg_of_mem_Icc hx0 hxπ
      simpa using this)
    (by
      have hmono : MonotoneOn Real.cos (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi) := by
        intro x hx y hy hxy
        exact Real.cos_antitone_on_Icc hx hy hxy
      have : Real.cos '' Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) Real.pi = Set.Icc (-1 : ℝ) 1 := by
        simpa [image_cos_Icc] using (image_cos_Icc (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := Real.pi))
      simpa [Set.Icc, intervalIntegral.integral_of_le (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.pi by exact Real.pi_pos.le),
        intervalIntegral.integral_of_le (show (-1 : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) by linarith)]))

simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using
    (intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_deriv_eq_integral_image
      (f := fun y => f y) (g := fun x => Real.cos x) (g' := fun x => -Real.sin x)
      (a := (0:ℝ)) (b := Real.pi)
      (by
        intro x hx
        have : deriv Real.cos x = -Real.sin x := by simpa using (Real.deriv_cos x)
        simpa [this])
      (by
        have hmono : StrictAntiOn Real.cos (Set.Icc (0:ℝ) Real.pi) := by
          intro x hx y hy hxy
          exact Real.cos_strictAntiOn_Icc (by simpa using hx) (by simpa using hy) hxy
        exact hmono.monotoneOn)
      (by
        have : Real.cos (0:ℝ) = 1 := by simpa using Real.cos_zero
        have : Real.cos Real.pi = -1 := by simpa using Real.cos_pi
        simp [Set.image_eq_range, intervalIntegral, this])
